characters.name: 江岚
characters.description: 2D国漫少女角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，年轻女性，黑色中长发带整齐刘海，圆润清秀但不幼态的脸，浅灰蓝长袖连衣裙，深色腰带，清楚可见的领口、袖口和裙摆层次，平底深色鞋，身形纤细，气质安静克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景，完整穿衣，不能像灰模或人体模板。

characters.name: 沈砚
characters.description: 2D国漫青年男性角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，黑色短发，清秀偏瘦的脸，深色长外套或长袍内搭浅色上衣，长裤和深色鞋靴，身形修长，气质沉稳克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景。

shots.title: 河边远景建立
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, wide establishing shot at the same dusk riverside location, Jiang Lan stands on the left stone path and Shen Yan stands on the right stone path, both characters are clearly present as readable full-body figures inside the environment instead of pasted cutouts, feet firmly planted on the riverside path, correct scale and natural perspective, old stone bridge in the mid background, willow trees on screen left, open river surface on screen right, unified guoman cinematic style, soft dusk light, consistent shadow direction, stable anatomy, clean silhouette, no border
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, scenery only, no people, missing character, wrong character count, floating character, hovering feet, tiny distant figure, cut off body, duplicate person, pasted character, character sheet, collage, mosaic artifact, warped bridge, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: slow push in, subtle river ripples, willow leaves sway lightly, both characters hold a stable standing pose with readable silhouettes
shots.notes: 建立镜头必须先把两人明确放进同一河边空间。人物不是贴图，脚要接地，桥和河岸关系稳定，画面不能出现白边。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 双人中景起话
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, medium two shot at the same riverside location, Jiang Lan stands in the left half of the frame and turns slightly toward Shen Yan on the right, both full bodies remain visible with feet grounded on the stone path, bridge stays visible in the center background, river remains on the right, readable standing action, natural body scale, natural lighting matching the dusk riverside, integrated shadows, same faces, same costumes, same environment continuity, not a portrait crop, not a pasted cutout
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, missing one character, wrong character count, glamour portrait, indoor selfie, floating character, detached shadow, deformed anatomy, duplicated body, cut off feet, overexposed background, pasted character, character sheet, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan gives a small head turn and subtle hand gesture while speaking, Shen Yan remains grounded and mostly still, camera stays stable
shots.notes: 双人对话中景。动作要清楚，但仍以稳定站位为主。两人必须完整处于河边空间中，不能只剩半身。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 江岚近景说话
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, closer medium shot focused on Jiang Lan at center-left, Jiang Lan remains clearly inside the riverside environment with grounded feet and readable upper body gesture, Shen Yan stays visible on the right as a smaller secondary full-body figure, bridge and river orientation remain unchanged, Jiang Lan speaks calmly with a slight three-quarter turn, soft dusk side light, consistent shadows, stable anatomy, integrated character and environment, not an isolated portrait, not a fashion shot
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, missing secondary character, empty scene, no people, glamour portrait, indoor lighting, floating body, cropped feet, pasted character, character sheet, wrong hairstyle, changed outfit, mosaic artifact, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan moves her shoulders slightly and speaks with a controlled hand gesture, Shen Yan gives a small background reaction, water movement stays subtle
shots.dialogue: 江岚：先沿着河岸往前走。
shots.notes: 江岚是主体，但沈砚仍必须在场。不能把镜头退化成单人摆拍肖像，人物和环境要继续融合。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 沈砚回应点头
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, reverse medium close shot focused on Shen Yan at center-right, Shen Yan is the primary full-body figure with grounded feet on the riverside path, Jiang Lan remains present on the left edge as a readable secondary figure, same bridge orientation, same river placement, same willow trees, same dusk light, Shen Yan gives a gentle nod with a clear readable response action, natural perspective, stable anatomy, integrated lighting, not a pasted collage, not a border-framed composition
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, missing foreground character, wrong character count, swapped character identity, malformed hands, detached feet, floating stance, pasted character, character sheet, abstract block, mosaic artifact, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Shen Yan nods gently and gives a brief reply while keeping his stance grounded, Jiang Lan remains visible on the left, camera stays steady
shots.dialogue: 沈砚：好，桥那边看得更清楚。
shots.notes: 反打镜头。主体切换到沈砚，但仍然必须维持双人空间关系和稳定接地。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 并肩沿河慢走
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, medium wide shot, Jiang Lan and Shen Yan walk slowly side by side along the same riverside path from left to right, Jiang Lan is slightly ahead on the left and Shen Yan is half a step behind on the right, both walking poses are clearly readable, feet contact the ground naturally, body scale and perspective remain correct, river stays on the right side of the frame, bridge remains in the distance, dusk light and shadow direction stay consistent, integrated motion inside the environment, not a static pasted lineup
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, no people, missing one character, wrong character count, floating feet, detached shadow, body duplication, fused limbs, pasted character, character sheet, random strangers, mosaic artifact, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: both characters take a few slow grounded steps along the river path, cloth and hair move lightly in the breeze, camera tracks gently with them
shots.notes: 动作镜头必须真的像走路，不是站立立绘平移。脚要踩在地面上，人物不能漂。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 桥边停步收尾
shots.prompt: cinematic storyboard frame, exact character count is 2 and only 2, closing medium two shot near the same riverside bridge, Jiang Lan stops on the left slightly in front and Shen Yan stops on the right slightly behind, both characters remain clearly present with grounded feet and natural posture, they look toward the water, same dusk lighting, same bridge orientation, same willow trees, same stone bank, integrated cinematic composition, stable anatomy, consistent perspective, characters belong inside the scene rather than pasted onto it, no border
shots.negative_prompt: white border, frame, padding, empty scene, scenery only, missing one character, wrong character count, floating character, detached feet, cropped body, duplicate person, pasted character, character sheet, indoor lighting, mosaic artifact, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: both characters stop and hold briefly, slight eye movement and subtle cloth motion remain visible, water ripples softly in the background
shots.dialogue: 江岚：就从这里开始看吧。
shots.notes: 收尾镜头必须稳住空间关系、人物前后站位和统一光照。两人都要明确在场且无白边。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。
